core_mechanism: Symbolic coarse-graining of a continuous-time dynamical system: successive crossings of a lower-dimensional Poincare cross-section reduce the flow to a discrete return map, and a finite partition of that section encodes every trajectory as a sequence of discrete symbols over a fixed alphabet.
brief_reason: The abstract's method identifies Poincare sections (via Koopman analysis and ordinal patterns), builds a return map on them, and uses that to partition state space so continuous flows are faithfully represented as discrete symbol sequences.
